ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Biogas, Coal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the energy source in MWh */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Average efficiency of the energy source */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the energy source is renewable */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the summary period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the summary period */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the energy production facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy generation facility */,
  "biogas_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from biogas during the period */,
  "biomass_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from biomass during the period */,
  "coal_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from coal during the period */,
  "geothermal_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from geothermal sources during the period */,
  "large_hydro_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from large hydro sources during the period */,
  "natural_gas_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from natural gas during the period */,
  "nuclear_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from nuclear sources during the period */,
  "other_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from other sources during the period */,
  "small_hydro_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from small hydro sources during the period */,
  "solar_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from solar during the period */,
  "wind_total" REAL /* Total energy produced from wind during the period */,
  "total_production_cost" REAL /* Total cost of producing the energy during the period */,
  "total_environmental_impact" REAL /* Total environmental impact during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source associated with the maintenance */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy generation facility */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source associated with the alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy generation facility */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy generation facility */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency percentage of the energy source */,
  "downtime" REAL /* Downtime in hours for the energy source */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if maintenance is needed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source being evaluated for compliance */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy generation facility */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks regarding the compliance evaluation */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the compliance evaluation */,
  "inspection_duration" REAL /* Duration of the inspection in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("facility_id")
)
